mission.lead: WSUA mobilizes communities across the Western United States to support Ukraine through humanitarian aid, legal research, and energy independence for rural communities. We work to protect the rights of displaced Ukrainians, strengthen accountability efforts, and build the foundations for long-term recovery and restitution.
mission.trustLine: Pursuing 501(c)(3) status - Transparent reporting - EIN 41-359-3491 - UBI 606-029-374
